intro.line1: Credentials are stored server-side and injected into the script process at run time — they
intro.bold: never appear in source code, input data, or the frontend
intro.line2: Read them in a script with
intro.line3: (keys are case-insensitive). All scripts share the same set of secrets.

confirm.deleteMessage: Delete secret {{key}}? Scripts referencing it will no longer read a value.

createDialog.title: New Secret
createDialog.description: Keys may contain letters, digits and underscores, and cannot start with a digit.
createDialog.keyInvalid: Only letters / digits / underscore, cannot start with a digit
createDialog.keyCollides: A secret with this key already exists (case-insensitive)

editDialog.leaveBlank: Leave blank to keep it unchanged.
